name: MetroCity Bankshares, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (the Company), a bank holding company incorporated in 2014 and headquartered in the Atlanta metropolitan area. We primarily operate through our wholly-owned banking subsidiary, Metro City Bank, a Georgia state-chartered commercial bank that was founded in 2006 (the Bank). We currently operate 29 full-service branch locations in multi-ethnic communities in Alabama, California, Florida, Georgia, New York, New Jersey, Texas and Virginia. As of December ...
